title: Skintelligent — Dermatology Screening Assistant
stack: PyTorch · Computer Vision · FastAPI · OpenCV · Grad-CAM
points: AI-powered dermatology screening system for early skin disease detection.
Trained deep learning models to classify multiple skin conditions from clinical images.
Applied Grad-CAM to highlight affected regions and improve prediction explainability.
Designed for fast, accessible screening and later evolved into the core vision engine of PIPI.
Built as a production-ready research project with a scalable FastAPI backend.
